data.title: BABA Stock Climbs Over 4% In Friday Pre-Market: What's Going On?
data.description: Alibaba Group Holding Ltd. (NYSE: BABA) climbed 4% during the pre-market trading session on Friday following strong financial performance for the third quarter.

data.title: Tesla Bull Says Rivian Is A Long Way From Making Money: 'Absent Volkswagen And Amazon As Sugar Daddies They Would Probably Be History'
data.description: Rivian reported a quarterly gross profit of $170 million for the first time in the fourth quarter owing to the sale of regulatory credits.

data.title: As Covid Drug Cash Dwindles, Vigonvita Targets New Remedies
data.description: A Chinese biotech that became popular by co-developing an anti-Covid drug has filed for a Hong Kong stock market listing.

data.title: Apple's Visual Intelligence May Come To iPhone 15 Pro: Here's How It Can Transform Your Camera With AI-Powered Real-Time Search
data.description: Apple is reportedly bringing its AI-powered Visual Intelligence feature to iPhone 15 Pro models via an upcoming iOS update.

data.title: New FBI Director Kash Patel Holds Over $100,000 In Bitcoin ETFs, Has Significant Exposure To BTC Miner Core Scientific
data.description: Kash Patel, the newly confirmed Federal Bureau of Investigation director, has significant exposure to Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC), according to a financial disclosure.
